drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f0 != true)
then
    insert(new T1($p0_0.getF1(), $p0_0.isF0()));
    insert(new T1($p0_0.getF1(), $p0_0.isF0()));
end
rule "R1"
when
    T0($b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f1)
then
    insert(new T2($b1_0_0, 2, false));
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T2(f0 not in (3.0, 1.5), f0 in (-2.0, 5.0, 0.0), $b2_0_0 : f1, $b2_0_1 : f1)
then
    delete($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
when
    T2()
then
end
rule "R4"
no-loop
when
    T2(f2 == false, f2 == true)
then
end
rule "R5"
when
    $p5_0 : T1(f0 >= 8, $b5_0_0 : f0, $b5_0_1 : f1)
then
    insert(new T2($p5_0.getF0(), $p5_0.getF0(), $p5_0.isF1()));
end
query Q0(long $qa0_0, boolean $qa0_1)
    $qp0_0 : T2(f1 == $qa0_0, f2 != true, f2 != true, $qb0_0 : f0)
    $qp0_1 : T2(f2 == $qa0_1, f0 == $qb0_0, f0 == $qb0_0)
end

query Q1(long $qa1_0, boolean $qa1_1)
    $qp1_0 : T1(f0 == $qa1_0, f1 == $qa1_1, $qb1_0 : f1, $qb1_1 : f1)
    $qp1_1 : T2(f2 == $qb1_0, f2 == $qb1_0, $qb1_2 : f2)
end
